2349000.name: LAPSUS
2349000.description:
Get ready for a mind-bending, 2D puzzle-platformer unlike anything you've ever experienced before. In LAPSUS, you'll need to think in multiple timelines simultaneously to overcome the challenging and innovative puzzles that lie ahead. Prepare to be mentally stretched and squeezed as you jump through dangerous traps, freeze yourself in time, and even turn your world upside down in order to solve over 80 levels.



The game's never-before-seen mechanics will put your brain to the test and push your cognitive abilities to the limit. But don't worry, the satisfaction of finally cracking each puzzle will make all the hard work worth it. So get ready to embark on a thrilling and exhilarating journey that will test your skills like never before.



  • Over 80 Levels spread across Four unique Worlds, each with its own challenges and puzzles.
  • Unique time-travel mechanic that requires you to think across multiple timelines simultaneously, bending time and space in the process.
  • Unleash your creativity with never-seen gameplay mechanics that challenge you to think outside the box.
  • Prepare to be challenged by over 15 hours of demanding gameplay that will push your mind and fingers to their limits.



In a desolate future, you are the last surviving scientist tasked with discovering the cause of a catastrophic event that wiped out all life on your planet. During your research on time travel, something goes terribly wrong, and you wake up with no memory of recent events.

As you journey back to your laboratory, you discover that the timeline has been fractured, and multiple realities are converging on your world. You must navigate through four distinct zones, each with its own unique challenges and obstacles that can only be overcome by manipulating time and space.



But as you near the end of your journey, you realize that the consequences of your actions may be too much to bear. Can you prevent a catastrophic event from happening again? Or will your research trigger a chain reaction that leads to an eternal paradox? The fate of your world is in your hands.
2349000.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
